data.content: Implemented: TerminalSession now carries knotsLeaseId+knotsAgentInfo (mirrored from entry.knotsLeaseAgentInfo via syncSessionLeaseInfo on acquire/rotate/release). ActiveTerminal carries only knotsLeaseId. New hook useTerminalAgentInfoMap joins terminals with /api/terminal snapshot. Migrated useAgentInfoMap, useTerminalPanelState. Spawn sites in use-ship-beat/use-scene-manager/use-terminal-xterm/retake-view-helpers updated. Removed updateAgent action; agent_switch event triggers lease refetch. terminal-approval-session reads from entry.knotsLeaseAgentInfo. Quality gates: lint clean, tsc clean, 3119 tests passing, build succeeds. New tests: use-terminal-agent-info (6 cases) and sync-session-lease-info (4 cases). Storybook beat-status-badge.stories.tsx fails because the component file does not exist on origin/main; pre-existing, unrelated. Approvals store kept separate per knot scope. Commit: e5cce7b6.
